response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analysed video content and identified the song 'Hyper Jumpin'' by Hololive 5th Generation. 2. Identified composer as Panda Boy via search results. 3. Broke down the video into segments based on repeating structural patterns: intro text, performance, and info slides. 4. Obtained full lyrics. 5. Constructed JSON with accurate timestamps and metadata.
response.global_summary: The video is a promotional clip for the 'nebolabo live re:VISION' Hololive 5th Generation event. It features a repeating structure, alternating between an introductory animation, a musical performance of 'Hyper Jumpin'', and various informational screens about the live event, including ticketing and merchandise.

scenes.description: Introductory animation with starry night background and scrolling text.
Performance of the song 'Hyper Jumpin'' featuring Momosuzu Nene, Omaru Polka, Shishiro Botan, and Yukihana Lamy on stage.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en: Hyper Jumpin' now... Let's jump out, come on baby, shine bright, heart pounding pump it up, hyper jumpin' to the future, more, more, I want more stimulation. Children playing is a waste, rising tension from low pressure, drinking and typing back mentions, driving the cart for the mission, speeding up like this, what's at the end of the journey? Stopless feelings, starting with a run-up, let's cross dimensions, come on, hyper jumpin', let's jump, dancing shake it up, hyper jumpin' to the other side of the sky, more, more, I want to get closer (woh...), I want my heart to race, gimme gimme gimme love (woh...), I want to fly higher and further. Hyper Jumpin' now... Solving questions from an angle, a chainsaw that tears through negativity, interacting with flowing comments, training aim for a flick shot, dis is no no, if you like it more more more, shoot down noisy interferences bang bang bang, just want to play, ignore the antis, laugh it off, kick it away, kick it!! jump around!!, we are traveling like this, what's at the end of the journey? Linking with the believed future, let's cross dimensions, come on, hyper jumpin', let's jump over, dancing shake it up, hyper jumpin' to the other side of the sea, more, more, I want to get closer (woh...), I want my heart to race, gimme gimme gimme love (woh...), I want to fly higher and further. Hyper Jumpin' now...

scenes.description: Informational slides about ticket types, schedules, and event merchandise.
